themes.name: 中東地緣政治動盪影響全球金融市場與美元走勢
themes.insight: 中東地區衝突的持續和升級，對全球金融市場，特別是美元的走勢產生顯著影響。市場對地緣政治風險的擔憂，導致美元出現波動，但同時也推動了避險情緒，增加了對美元的需求。此外，油價飆升與通膨預期也成為市場關注的焦點。
evidence: 緊盯中東局勢，美元走勢掙扎
中東衝突難解，推動美元上漲
美股因中東局勢波動，能源與農業挑戰加劇，投資策略需調整
美股漲跌互見，油價飆升與中東局勢影響投資者情緒和通膨預期
中東局勢升溫影響油價與全球經濟，投資人需謹慎應對不確定性

themes.name: AI產業鏈擴張引領投資新機遇，涵蓋算力至基礎設施
themes.insight: AI產業的發展正從單純的科技股，擴展到更廣泛的基礎設施領域，例如電力供應。儘管整體股市面臨波動，但AI作為長期的發展趨勢，仍為市場帶來新的投資機會。
evidence: AI產業鏈不只科技股？從算力到電力，...
雖然道瓊、那斯達克及費城半導體指數皆呈現弱勢，但AI發展的中長線趨勢仍然看好。

themes.name: 台灣股市面臨重挫，但部分個股表現亮眼
themes.insight: 整體台股市場遭受重挫，然而，在市場波動中，仍有部分個股展現強勁表現，例如特斯拉獲得高度評價，以及樺漢的訂單狀況樂觀，顯示個別公司的基本面或特定題材仍能吸引投資目光。
evidence: 台股重挫594點，特斯拉獲五顆星評價，豐興鋼價上漲，樺漢訂單超1900億

themes.name: 亞洲股市具潛力，主動式基金與ETF受青睞
themes.insight: 儘管中東地緣政治風險導致亞洲股市面臨賣壓，但從長期來看，亞洲市場仍被看好。同時，統一投信和富蘭克林等基金公司的主動式基金和ETF持續獲得肯定，顯示投資者對專業管理基金的信心。
evidence: 統一投信主動式基金、被動ETF雙獲...
基金獎常勝軍富蘭克林再添戰績 奪傑...
雖然中東戰火未歇，亞股上週賣壓湧現，但長期亞洲市場依舊被看好。

items.title: India's energy supply sees constant growth as renewable potential crosses 47 lakh MW
items.summary:
India's renewable energy capacity now stands at 47,04,043 megawatts (MW). Among this, solar energy dominates, with capacity jumping from 7,48,990 MW in FY2023-24 to 33,43,378 MW in FY2024-25, contributing nearly 71 per cent of total renewable potential. Wind power adds 11,63,856 MW, while large hydro contributes 1,33,410 MW, according to the latest "Energy Statistics India 2026" report by the National Statistics Office (NSO).

Most of the renewable energy potential is concentrated in six states: Rajasthan, Maharashtra, Gujarat, Andhra Pradesh, Karnataka, and Madhya Pradesh, which together account for over 70 per cent of the total capacity.

Energy use in India has also been steadily rising. Per-capita consumption increased from 15,296 Mega Joules per person in FY2015-16 to 18,096 Mega Joules in FY2024-25, growing at an average rate of 1.89 per cent per year.

Investment in the energy sector has surged as well. Credit flow grew from Rs 1,688 crore in 2021 to Rs 10,325 crore in 2025, highlighting strong financial support for energy projects across the country.

Electricity generation from renewable sources (including both utility and non-utility sectors) also saw a sharp rise, climbing from 1,89,314 GWh in FY2015-16 to 4,16,823 GWh in FY2024-25, a compound annual growth rate of 9.17 per cent as reported by IANS.

Despite the renewable surge, coal remains India's main energy source, increasing from 3,87,761 KToE in FY2015-16 to 5,52,315 KToE in FY2024-25. Other energy sources such as crude oil and natural gas have also seen consistent growth, contributing to India's diverse energy mix.

The total final consumption (TFC) of energy across households, industries, and transport continues to rise, reflecting India's growing energy requirements. With increasing renewable capacity and stable investment in energy infrastructure, the country is gradually moving toward a more balanced and sustainable energy future.

items.title: Prolonged Middle East crisis sparks garbage bag hoarding - UPI.com
items.summary:
Consumers in South Korea are stockpiling garbage bags as prolonged Middle East tensions continue to disrupt the global crude oil and naphtha supply, raising concerns over potential shortages of plastic and vinyl products, industry sources said Monday.

Major discount and convenience store chains have reported a surge in garbage bag sales and begun limiting per-person purchases amid the spike in demand.

The supply concerns come with disruptions in the domestic naphtha supply, a key feedstock widely used in petrochemical and other industries, following U.S. and Israeli air strikes on Iran.

Under South Korea's volume-based waste fee system, households are required to use district-designated plastic bags for general and food waste. The bags are sold at convenience stores, supermarkets and other neighborhood shops.

Related OECD cuts South Korea growth forecast to 1.7% Trump delays Iran strike; South Korea weighs non-military options Seoul shares crash over 6 pct on escalating U.S.-Iran conflict

E-Mart, a leading discount store chain under retail giant Shinsegae, reported a 287 percent on-year increase in garbage bag sales between March 22 and Sunday, while Lotte Mart saw a 140 percent rise from March 23 to Saturday.

GS25, a convenience store chain operated by GS Group, posted a 325 percent jump in garbage bag sales.

To curb panic buying and manage inventories, many retailers have begun limiting purchases of standard volume-based garbage bags.

Homeplus, for example, has issued guidelines to its stores restricting purchases to one bundle per person.

At the same time, concerns are also rising over potential shortages of plastic containers and packaging materials.

Fried chicken chains, coffee shops and other delivery-focused businesses -- which rely heavily on plastic containers and cups -- are reporting rising costs.

"A disposable cup manufacturer has raised the possibility of price hikes and production cuts," an official from Ediya Coffee said.

Genesis BBQ Group, which operates the BBQ Chicken franchise, recently held a meeting with franchisees, warning that rising oil prices could increase overall costs, including those for plastic shopping bags, aluminum containers and logistics.

"While there are no immediate supply issues with our current inventory, there is a high likelihood of price increases," a chicken franchise official said. "If the situation persists, the burden could eventually shift to franchise owners."

Copyright (c) Yonhap News Agency prohibits its content from being redistributed or reprinted without consent, and forbids the content from being learned and used by artificial intelligence systems.

items.title: Mustard Bounty: India's Rapeseed Revolution | Headlines
items.summary:
India's rapeseed-mustard production is projected to reach 119.4 lakh tonnes in the rabi season of 2025-26, showing a growth from the previous year's 115.2 lakh tonnes. The increase is attributed to better agronomic practices and favorable weather. Rajasthan leads in production, contributing significantly to domestic oil availability and reduced imports.

The Solvent Extractors' Association of India (SEA) has announced that rapeseed-mustard production in India is expected to rise to 119.4 lakh tonnes in the upcoming 2025-26 rabi season. This marks an increase from 115.2 lakh tonnes last year, based on comprehensive field surveys and remote sensing across major mustard districts.

President of SEA, Sanjeev Asthana, noted that the area under rapeseed-mustard cultivation has expanded to 93.91 lakh hectares, up from 92.15 lakh hectares in 2024-25. Average yield is also set to improve from 1,250 kg to 1,271 kg per hectare, due to improved farming techniques and favorable climate conditions.

Rajasthan is poised to lead production with 53.9 lakh tonnes, followed by Uttar Pradesh and Madhya Pradesh, at 18.1 and 13.9 lakh tonnes respectively. These projected increases will enhance domestic edible oil supplies and lessen import dependency. A final validation of these estimates will occur in April-May.

items.title: Vietnam imposes 0.1 pct tax on crypto asset transfers
items.summary:
HANOI, March 30 (Xinhua) -- Vietnam's Ministry of Finance has issued a circular on tax obligations in crypto asset trading, imposing a 0.1 percent tax on the value of each crypto asset transaction for both domestic and foreign, as well as resident and non-resident, investors, local media outlet VnEconomy reported Monday.

Meanwhile, corporate investors earning income from crypto asset transfers will be subject to corporate income tax at a standard rate of 20 percent, while foreign institutional investors transferring crypto assets through service providers will pay tax at a rate of 0.1 percent on each deal.

The transfer and trading of crypto assets are not subject to value-added tax, the report added.

The regulation took effect on March 27 and will apply during the implementation period of Vietnam's crypto asset pilot program, or until official tax regulations for the sector are issued, according to the report. ■

ai_analysis.full_text:
今日結論 (2026-03-30)

台股加權指數收在33,112點，本益比為3.33。市場情緒顯示為「貪婪」，但需謹慎拉回的風險。隔夜美國ADR表現疲弱，加上VIX恐慌指數飆升至31.05，短期操作建議採取保守策略。
【新聞驅動】
本週新聞重點聚焦於中東地緣政治動盪對全球金融市場及美元匯率的影響，以及AI產業鏈的擴張為投資帶來新機遇，涵蓋從算力到基礎設施的各個環節。儘管台灣股市近期面臨重挫，部分個股仍有亮眼表現。同時，亞洲股市顯現潛力，主動式基金與ETF受到關注。新聞來源涵蓋MoneyDJ熱門排行、鉅亨網台灣、美國股市/宏觀經濟、全球頭條以及東南亞/印度市場動態。
【國際與台股】
國際股市方面，S&P 500下跌1.67%，Nasdaq下跌2.15%，費城半導體指數(SOX)下跌1.69%，道瓊工業平均指數下跌1.73%。Nasdaq期貨小幅下跌0.67%。VIX恐慌指數大幅上漲13.16%，達到31.05。台積電ADR則逆勢上漲0.19%，台灣ETF下跌0.87%。台灣股市加權指數(TAIEX)下跌594.43點，收在32,518.16點。台灣股市情緒指標顯示為「貪婪」(63)，但市場廣度指標（上漲家數226，下跌家數772）偏弱。CNN and Crypto 的恐慌恐懼指數均顯示「極度恐懼」。
【KOL與情緒】
市場KOL觀點呈現明顯的看跌趨勢，看跌比例達38%，看漲比例為12%。市場關注的主要主題包括中東地緣政治風險與美元走勢（佔比90%）、AI產業鏈（佔比75%）以及亞股主動式基金與ETF（佔比65%）。

籌碼與族群

截至2026年3月30日，根據公開市場數據，外資淨賣超639.4億元，投信淨買超33.8億元，自營商淨賣超134.0億元。盤面上強勢族群主要為塑膠工業（7.54%）和造紙工業（2.91%）。

chart_orchestration.overall_summary: 本週台股加權指數面臨重挫，收在33,112點。市場情緒顯示「貪婪」，但美股ADR疲弱及VIX恐慌指數飆升至31.05，預示短期波動加劇，操作上建議採取保守策略。新聞焦點集中在中東地緣政治動盪對全球市場及美元匯率的影響，以及AI產業鏈的持續擴張帶來的投資機會。儘管整體台股承壓，但部分個股仍展現韌性。亞洲股市面臨賣壓，但長期潛力仍存，主動式基金與ETF持續受到關注。

news_themes.label: 中東地緣政治動盪影響全球金融市場與美元走勢
news_themes.summary: 中東地區的衝突和地緣政治緊張局勢持續升級，對全球金融市場和美元匯率造成顯著影響。市場對地緣政治風險的擔憂，導致美元波動，同時也推升了避險情緒，可能增加對美元的需求。油價的上漲和通膨預期的增強也成為市場關注焦點。
evidence: 中東地緣政治動盪影響全球金融市場與美元走勢

news_themes.label: AI產業鏈擴張引領投資新機遇，涵蓋算力至基礎設施
news_themes.summary: 人工智慧（AI）產業正持續擴張，其影響力已從單純的科技類股，延伸至更廣泛的基礎設施領域，例如電力供應。儘管整體股市面臨波動，但AI作為長期發展趨勢，為市場提供了新的投資機會。
evidence: AI產業鏈擴張為投資帶來新機遇，涵蓋從算力到基礎設施的各個環節

news_themes.label: 台灣股市面臨重挫，但部分個股表現亮眼
news_themes.summary: 整體台灣股市近期經歷重挫，但市場中仍有部分個股展現出強勁的表現。例如，特斯拉獲得高度評價，而樺漢的訂單情況樂觀，顯示個別公司基本面或特定題材仍能吸引投資者的關注。
evidence: 儘管台灣股市近期面臨重挫，部分個股仍有亮眼表現。

news_themes.label: 亞洲股市潛力與主動式基金、ETF受關注
news_themes.summary: 儘管中東地緣政治風險對亞洲股市造成賣壓，但從長遠來看，亞洲市場仍被看好。同時，統一投信和富蘭克林等基金公司推出的主動式基金和ETF持續獲得市場肯定，顯示投資者對專業管理的基金產品抱持信心。
evidence: 亞洲股市顯現潛力，主動式基金與ETF受到關注。

headline.teaser: 🚨 ANYA 風險警報：地緣政治
